    → explain the changes on this worktree

    … cogitated for 0s

    ● Bash({"cmd":"git status"})
      ⎿ On branch feature/i18n
        Changes not staged for commit:
          (use "git add <file>..." to update what will be committed)

        … (+1 line, Ctrl-O to expand)

    ← The worktree adds a new permission UI and fixes tool-result wrapping.

    Highlights

    - Multi-line results are now split per source line
    - `[permission]` prompts route to `AnswerPermission`
    - Glyphs use text-presentation Unicode (no emoji)

    ── ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    → now stash any local changes

    … Stash is mutating; let me request permission first.

    [permission] Bash requested — {"cmd":"git stash push -m 'snapshot'"}
                 y = allow once, a = allow session, t = allow tool, enter/n = deny
